rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (2/10) and rest on the same job-relevant deficiencies: lacking the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ on Windows, missing Fixed Income/Capital Markets domain expertise, and no SQL Server/Oracle experience. The variant's wording differs only cosmetically (e.g. '6 months' vs '7-month stint', 'Derivatives' added to the domain list), all within ordinary run-to-run rewording noise. Nothing in the variant keys off the name change to Aisha Okonkwo.
